Corncob Design Language AI integration contract

Primary rules

1. Use only Corncob classes and vanilla HTML and JavaScript.
2. Use the Corncob grid for page and section layout unless a component page documents a different internal layout.
3. Start from the canonical component code before adding enhancements.
4. Preserve documented class names, child order, and required relationships.
5. Use the grid around structured components instead of rewriting their internal DOM.

Default layout

Use this structure by default for general page composition:

<main class="corn-main corn-container">
  <div class="corn-row">
    <section class="corn-col-12">...</section>
  </div>
</main>

Use responsive spans with:

- corn-col-sm-*
- corn-col-md-*
- corn-col-lg-*
- corn-col-xl-*
- corn-col-xxl-*

Canonical before enhancement workflow

1. Find the canonical component example in components.json or the component docs page.
2. Emit the documented markup exactly.
3. Replace placeholder text, links, icons, and content.
4. Place the component within the Corncob grid if page layout is needed.
5. Add optional enhancements only after the canonical component code is correct.

Avoid

- inventing wrapper elements around required component children
- building a second custom grid system for normal layouts
- replacing canonical Corncob structure with framework-specific abstractions
- changing direct child order for documented components such as headers

Toggle-specific rules

- Use fieldset.corn-toggle-group with a legend and keep aria-labelledby linked to the legend id.
- Use one shared radio name across toggle options so selection is mutually exclusive.
- Keep unique input ids matched by label for attributes.
- Use only documented size modifiers: corn-toggle--xs, corn-toggle--sm, corn-toggle--md, corn-toggle--lg, corn-toggle--xl.
- For icon toggles, keep icons inside labels and provide aria-label on .corn-icon.
- Apply disabled directly on input elements.

Structured component example: header

- Required direct children of corn-header:
  - corn-company
  - corn-header--title
  - corn-header--nav
  - corn-header--actions
- Use the grid around the header for placement.
- Do not add custom wrapper containers inside corn-header unless explicitly documented.

Authoritative sources

- /guides/ai-integration/
- /tokens/grid/
- /components/headers/ and other component pages
- components.json
- tokens.json
